title: macrocentrum cristatum var. cristatum
intro: Macrocentrum cristatum var. cristatum, also known as the Creeping Jenny plant, is a flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Macrocentrum cristatum var. cristatum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and crushing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
